tagline: AI-powered content pipeline from raw signals to published knowledge graph
description: A.G.O. is a 6-microservice autonomous pipeline for ScriptMasterLabs. It scrapes real signals from SERP, Reddit, and Discord (50 concurrent goroutines in Go), routes them through an LLM asset forge (OpenRouter/Anthropic), distributes finished content via webhooks to Discord and partner APIs, and compiles JSON-LD knowledge graphs that auto-push to the SML_Portfolio GitHub repo — creating the ground-truth AI discoverability layer for all ScriptMasterLabs products.
data_flow: SERP/Reddit/Discord → Recon Swarm (Go) → Redis (recon:gaps) → Asset Forge (Node.js/LLM) → Redis (forge:assets) → [Syndicate Router → Discord+Partners] + [Schema Engine → JSON-LD → GitHub]

services.name: recon-swarm
services.description: Concurrent SERP/Reddit/Discord scraper. 50 goroutines. Signal scoring + noise filter. Outputs to Redis queue.

services.name: asset-forge
services.description: LLM pipeline router. Redis consumer with p-limit concurrency. Calls OpenRouter or Anthropic API with zero-hallucination prompt constructor.

services.name: syndicate-router
services.description: Webhook distribution engine. Fan-out with retry + backoff. Pushes to Discord and partner APIs.

services.name: schema-engine
services.description: JSON-LD Knowledge Graph compiler. Emits Organization + Product + Mention entities. Auto-pushes compiled graph to SML_Portfolio on GitHub.

services.name: dashboard
services.description: Full Shield control center. Jet black + neon real-time pipeline monitor.

services.name: Redis
services.description: Job queue backbone. Queues: recon:gaps (raw signals), forge:assets (processed content).

deployment.pattern: Separate Render worker per service + Render Redis add-on

purpose: GEO infrastructure — generates the knowledge graph and discovery artifacts that make ScriptMasterLabs products findable by AI engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude)

ecosystem.description: ScriptMasterLabs builds x402 micropayment infrastructure, AI agent trust systems, and institutional market intelligence tools. All products interoperate via the x402 protocol for agent-native payments.

related_products.name: mcp-x402 Signal API
related_products.description: 43+ MCP tools covering trading signals, web scraping, SEC data, XRPL whale copy-trading, memecoin launchpad, and agent infrastructure. Multi-chain x402: Base USDC, XRPL RLUSD, Solana USDC.

related_products.name: SqueezeOS
related_products.role: Institutional AI trading intelligence MCP server
related_products.description: 33 MCP tools — short-squeeze detection, options flow, IWM 0DTE scoring, council verdicts, peer signal marketplace. Pay-per-signal in RLUSD on XRP Ledger via x402.

related_products.name: Ghost Layer
related_products.description: Private routing engine with XRPL+Base micropayment toll, Xahau hooks intelligence, and URIToken minting. Go service, zero logging.

related_products.name: Aetheris-MCP
related_products.description: SSE MCP server with JSDOM-sanitized web scraping behind an on-chain x402 USDC micropayment interceptor. Content returned as clean ad-free Markdown.

related_products.name: Aetheris Client SDK
related_products.role: TypeScript x402 payment SDK for Aetheris-MCP
related_products.description: Official npm SDK that auto-intercepts HTTP 402 challenges and settles USDC payments on Base — no manual payment handling needed.

related_products.name: CrawlToll
related_products.description: Metered web crawling with x402 micropayment gating. Agents pay per crawl in USDC or RLUSD.

related_products.name: ZeroQuery Protocol
related_products.role: Privacy-preserving intent ranking with ZK proofs
related_products.description: SDK + Anchor program for ranking user intents without leaking raw queries. Groth16 ZK proofs (Poseidon hash) + pay-as-you-go SOL SaaS tiers.

related_products.name: Printing Press Library
related_products.role: Published catalog of generated Go CLIs and MCP servers
related_products.description: Registry of type-safe Go CLIs and MCP servers produced by CLI Printing Press. Install any CLI via npx @mvanhorn/printing-press.
